notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Maikel Garcia. Jake Burger to 2nd. Jake Burger advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Maikel Garcia.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Michael Helman singles on a ground ball to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. Nicky Lopez to 3rd. Nicky Lopez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Bobby Witt Jr.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin singles on a ground ball to left fielder Sam Haggerty. Isaac Collins to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas flies out to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.

notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin lines out to center fielder Michael Helman.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran singles on a fly ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Brandon Nimmo scores. Jake Burger to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue pops out to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.
